Rambo: Last Blood (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $44,819,352Details
International Box Office $46,559,534
Worldwide Box Office $91,378,886
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,094,139
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $16,835,820
Total $26,929,959
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Almost four decades after he drew first blood, John Rambo is back. Now, Rambo must confront his past and unearth his ruthless combat skills to exact revenge in a final mission.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,872,919 (42.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.37 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,618 opening theaters/3,618 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $58,519,586

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 20th, 2019 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: September 19th, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
September 19th, 2019 (Wide) (Malaysia)
September 19th, 2019 (Wide), released as РЭМБО: ПОСЛЕДНЯЯ КРОВЬ (Russia (CIS))
September 20th, 2019 (Wide), released as Rembo. Paskutinis kraujas (Lithuania)
September 20th, 2019 (Wide) (Middle East Region)
Video Release: December 17th, 2019 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong graphic violence, grisly images, drug use and language.
(Rating bulletin 2593 (Cert #52357), 8/28/2019)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Rambo
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Filming location (country): Bulgaria, Spain
Filming location (state or county): Canary Islands
Geographical setting: Arizona, Mexico
Plot point: Ex-soldier, One Last Job, Revenge, The Past Catching up with You
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Millennium Films, Campbell Grobman Films, Millennium Media, Balboa Productions, Templeton Media, Dadi Film Production
Production Countries: United States, Hong Kong
Languages: English
